narrative:
Raccoon Twp (precinct in Gallia County) has 665 registered voters, with 55.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.4 percentage points.
